hooks.command: f=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); [[ "$f" == *.ts || "$f" == *.tsx ]] && cd /mnt/c/workspace/loitering_tracking/client && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -30 || true
cd /mnt/c/workspace/loitering_tracking && echo '--- git status ---' && git status --short
